commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: Protected maintainer-labeled supply-chain policy work needs explicit maintainer/security handling before merge; no ClawSweeper repair lane should run without that approval.; Needs attention: The diff adds a supply-chain trust gate, but a blocked ClawHub release is still installable when the new acknowledgement flag is set.; Review finding: [P1] Keep download blocks non-overridable — src/plugins/clawhub.ts:565-566 (sha=18f3322cb4a37db8519ae52f0c6fa80b6fbd5490)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds ClawHub exact-release trust checks and `--acknowledge-clawhub-risk` to plugin install/update/update/doctor/onboarding paths, updates docs/tests/fixtures, and includes rebased runtime-config, Matrix test-runtime, gateway lint, and prompt snapshot compatibility changes.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: in the PR head, `blockedFromDownload` becomes a risk reason and `acknowledgeClawHubRisk` returns success for any risk reason. The branch test also expects archive download after acknowledging a blocked release.
commands.review_followup: Protected maintainer-labeled supply-chain policy work needs explicit maintainer/security handling before merge; no ClawSweeper repair lane should run without that approval.

target.title: Check ClawHub trust before plugin installs
target.author: jesse-merhi
